items.headline: India's CPI inflation rises to 4.38% in June, exceeding RBI target
items.summary: Retail inflation, measured by CPI, rose to 4.38% in June 2026, surpassing the RBI's 4% target for the first time in 17 months, mainly due to higher food and fuel prices. While RBI is expected to maintain rates in August, analysts anticipate a cumulative 50 bps rate hike in H2 FY27.

items.headline: India's trade deficit widens to $30.43 billion in June
items.summary: India's exports increased by 15.5% to $40.41 billion in June, but imports grew approximately 31% to $70.84 billion, widening the trade deficit. India and the European Union are nearing completion of their trade pact text.

items.headline: Indian markets to open lower on weak global cues, rising crude prices
items.summary: Indian benchmark indices are expected to open lower, tracking weak global markets. The US-Iran conflict is weighing on risk sentiment, pushing Brent crude to $77.96 per barrel. FIIs were net sellers of Rs 3,062.27 crore.

items.headline: HCL Technologies reports 20.32% YoY net profit growth in Q1 FY27
items.summary: HCL Tech announced a 20.32% year-on-year increase in consolidated net profit to ₹4,624 crore for the June quarter of FY27 and declared an interim dividend of ₹12 per share.

items.headline: ICICI Prudential AMC Q1 net profit up 23%
items.summary: ICICI Prudential AMC reported a 23% increase in its net profit for the first quarter of the fiscal year.

items.headline: Avenue Supermarts (DMART) Q1 revenues meet estimates, EPS misses
items.summary: DMART reported Q1 revenues of ₹188 billion, in line with analyst predictions, but statutory earnings per share of ₹13.20 missed estimates by 2.2%.

items.headline: Several companies to announce Q1 FY27 results today
items.summary: L&T Technology Services, Tata Elxsi, Jindal Saw, Madhya Bharat Agro Products, SG Finserve, Anand Rathi Share & Stock Brokers, Den Networks, Benares Hotels, Manaksia Coated Metals & Industries, Aditya Birla Money, Dhampur Bio Organics, A2Z Infra Engineering, Viji Finance, Hathway Bhawani Cabletel And Datacom, Sulabh Engineers & Services, Infomedia Press, Daikaffil Chemicals India, Trio Mercantile and Trading, and Sanathnagar Enterprises are among the companies scheduled to announce their Q1 FY27 results today.

items.headline: IT sector rallies, Nifty IT jumps 3.59% after TCS results; auto sector also gains
items.summary: The IT sector showed significant strength with the Nifty IT index jumping 3.59% following strong numbers from TCS. HCL Tech and Infosys were among the top gainers. The auto sector also witnessed buying interest, while metal and capital goods sectors experienced selling pressure.

items.headline: Goodluck India announces bonus shares
items.summary: Goodluck India has announced the issuance of bonus shares to its shareholders.

items.headline: Grasim Industries subsidiary acquires Shell's Solenergi Power for ₹17,200 crore
items.summary: Grasim Industries, through its subsidiary Aditya Birla Renewables, agreed to acquire a 100% stake in Solenergi Power from Shell at an enterprise value of approximately ₹17,200 crore, adding about 5.0 GWp renewable portfolio.

items.headline: Emcure Pharmaceuticals acquires remaining stake in Gennova Biopharmaceuticals
items.summary: Emcure Pharmaceuticals acquired the remaining 12.05% stake in Gennova Biopharmaceuticals, making it a wholly-owned subsidiary.

items.headline: Welspun Enterprises subsidiary secures Pune Shirur highway project
items.summary: Welspun Enterprises' wholly-owned subsidiary signed a sub-concession agreement for the ~₹7,300 crore, 53.4 km Pune Shirur highway project.

items.headline: Several companies trade ex-dividend today, July 14, 2026
items.summary: Aditya Birla Real Estate (₹2.50), Aeroflex Industries (₹0.40), Bimetal Bearings (₹13.50), Hester Biosciences (₹0.40), Khaitan Chemicals & Fertilizers (₹0.05), Modison Limited (₹3), Motherson Sumi Wiring India Limited (₹0.25), Samvardhana Motherson International Limited (₹0.25), Supreme Petrochem Limited (₹8), Ultramarine & Pigments Limited (₹6), UTI Asset Management Company Limited (₹40), and India Motor Parts and Accessories Limited (₹23) are trading ex-dividend today.

items.headline: Stocks in focus ahead of Q1 FY27 results, corporate news, and technical breakouts
items.summary: A broad range of stocks are expected to be in focus today due to upcoming Q1 FY27 results (Tata Elxsi, HCL Tech, L&T Technology Services, Jindal Saw, Anand Rathi, Den Networks, DMART), specific news developments (SpiceJet, Biocon, SBI, Grasim, BEL, Timken India, Poonawalla Fincorp, Alembic Pharma), and technical chart patterns (Route Mobile, Coforge, Tata Power, Divi's Laboratories, Hindustan Aeronautics, Kfin Technologies, Abbott India, Welspun Living, PCBL Chemical, Tarsons Products, Saregama India, Neogen Chemicals).
